assumptions: A single local user runs the tracker from a terminal.

decisions.title: Node.js CLI runtime
decisions.context: The tracker must run without a server or browser.
decisions.decision: Ship a Node.js CLI with local JSON persistence.
consequences: Node.js 22 or newer is required to run the tracker.

phases.name: Local tracker core
phases.objective: Store and list tasks from the command line.

tasks.title: Add the add and list commands
tasks.objective: Expose the store through an in-memory CLI.
acceptanceCriteria: add and list round-trip a task.
